calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Subpoena
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CSAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE Motion To Enforce Subpoena is granted, no opposition filed. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
